introSection: Montaña Rusa is a steel sit-down roller coaster built by Spanish manufacturer Robles Bouso Atracciones currently located at Tivoli World in Benalmádena, Málaga, Andalusia, Spain.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The layout is a clone of the Pinfari Supersonic model.

fullText:
Montaña Rusa is a steel sit-down roller coaster built by Spanish manufacturer Robles Bouso Atracciones currently located at Tivoli World in Benalmádena, Málaga, Andalusia, Spain.

The layout is a clone of the Pinfari Supersonic model.
